message:
feat(polyfill): add guards for url and querystring native modules

- url: Only create JS url if _modules.url doesn't exist (native Zig)
- querystring: Only create JS querystring if _modules.querystring doesn't exist (native Zig)
- Both modules have zero-allocation native implementations

Native implementations provide:
- url: URL parsing, formatting, pathToFileURL
- querystring: parse, stringify, escape, unescape

This completes the major native module guards for 'thin JS / host rich Zig' architecture.
